base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of trees_bg_underwater_variant — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Trees background, underwater palette — magenta/pink trees + coral-pink foliage, re-reads as underwater kelp/coral cluster. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Trees background, underwater palette — magenta/pink trees + coral-pink foliage, re-reads as underwater kelp/coral cluster
